## Patient Summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated Dose (mg) | Frequency | Next Dose | PK Clearance (mL/min) | Notes |

| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick Take

- **CU-001:** Stable on current regimen.
- **CU-002:** Responding well; current dosing unchanged in latest config.
- **CU-003:** Newly enrolled; on the highest mg/kg dosing of the three and a more frequent schedule (q2w).

## PK Status

Based on the latest dosing config, the PK parameters appear internally consistent and there are no obvious signs in this file of instability or urgent dosing flags. Patient notes are favorable overall, with one stable case, one improving case, and one new enrollment under active monitoring.

> Note: This is a config-based summary, not a fresh model re-run or validation analysis.", recipients="")]
